title: (-)-α-Bisabolol GC sample preparation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"efo2q","text":"This is a quick guide for the preparation of (-)-α-bisabolol samples and external standards in dodecane for GC analysis. This protocol has been established in the Lindberg lab at Ångström laboratory (Uppsala University) for direct analysis of dodecane-based ex-situ extracts from cyanobacterial strains producing (-)-α-bisabolol. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":258,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c1974","text":"The protocol includes the preparation of stock solutions for the internal standard β-caryophyllene (BCP) and the external standard. The preparation of a fresh external standard series is suggested for each sample analysis. The calibration curve is required for quantification of (-)-α-bisabolol in the samples of interest. steps: %s %s Store Stocks in the fridge at ~ 4 °C Dodecane is toxic! Wear protective gloves and goggles. Work under the fume hood, or use a respirator! https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/compound/dodecane#section=Handling-and-Storage

Example: (-)-α-bisabolol external standard (ES) dilution series : 0; 12.5; 25; 50; 100; 200; 400; 800 µg * µL -1 %s %s High Range Dilution Series: Vol. Stock II Vol. Stock C Transfer to vial (2 x) 800 µg*mL-1 400 0 200 400 µg*mL-1 250 250 200 200 µg*mL-1 125,0 375,0 200 100 µg*mL-1 62,5 437,5 200 50 µg*mL-1 31,25 468,75 200 25 µg*mL-1 15,63 484,38 200 0 µg*mL-1 0,0 500,0 200 Sum 884,375 2515,625 Dodecane is toxic! Wear protective gloves and goggles. Work under the fume hood, or use a respirator! https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/compound/dodecane#section=Handling-and-Storage
%s %s Dodecane is toxic! Wear protective gloves and goggles. Work under the fume hood, or use a respirator! https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/compound/dodecane#section=Handling-and-Storage

pipette 198 µL sample to GC vial add each 2 μL Stock B Dodecane is toxic! Wear protective gloves and goggles. Work under the fume hood, or use a respirator! https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/compound/dodecane#section=Handling-and-Storage
